arch_technique_ranking.description: Selfcomp/Quantizr-style: renderer is its own decoder
arch_technique_ranking.name: self_compress_neural_codec

axis_priorities.name: pose
axis_priorities.rationale: dS/d(d_pose) = 271.16 at this operating point. Improving d_pose by 1e-5 reduces score by ~0.00271 (linear approximation; pose term is sqrt so the actual reduction is slightly larger for the same delta).

axis_priorities.name: seg
axis_priorities.rationale: dS/d(d_seg) = 100.00 (constant). Improving d_seg by 1e-4 reduces score by 0.01000.

axis_priorities.name: bytes
axis_priorities.rationale: dS/dB = 6.659e-07 per byte (constant 0.00067 per 1000 bytes). Saving 1 KB reduces score by 0.00067.

notes: Operating regime: pose-dominated regime (d_pose 3.40e-05 < 2.50e-04); prioritize pose-targeted lanes — they have 2.71x the marginal score-per-byte vs seg lanes here
To reach 0.15500: need -0.04954 score points. Top-3 techniques rank by predicted score-delta.

PR101 hand-coded entropy probes are saturated near the 178 KB brotli/AAC band: the best charged Markov-1 table rerun is 200,219 B, so the currently tested table-transmission path loses. This is not a global no-ML impossibility proof; sub-178 KB still needs a new charged coder, a shared decoder model, or lower-entropy weights. Architecture has 5-10x more predicted headroom.

Evidence feed contains 20 unknown technique name(s) that are reported but not ranked until cataloged or aliased: compressai_balle_cross_tensor_hyperprior, cross_paradigm_admm_continuous_k_then_op1_finalizer, cross_paradigm_admm_continuous_k_then_op1_finalizer_substrate_corrected, cross_paradigm_canonical_8_stack_matrix_real_pr101_substrate, hstack_of_vstacks_per_tensor_brotli, hstack_per_tensor_codec_choice_brotli_or_sparsity, joint_admm_lagrangian_allocation, joint_admm_x_continuous_lossy_coarsening

Non-promotable, proxy, or exact-negative empirical anchors are assigned zero active ranking delta: arch_shrink_x0.4_quantizr_class, compressai_balle_hyperprior, kalle_fold_mixture_canonical_shapes, lossy_coarsening_analytical, lossy_int4_quantization, sparsity_alpha_0.7_imp_retrain, tiny_nn_pmf_predictor
Exact-negative evidence retires only the measured config unless family_falsified/method_family_retired is explicitly true: lossy_coarsening_analytical
Validation queue preserves blocked/proxy/cross-paradigm signals without promoting them; queue rows are not score claims and cannot dispatch until blockers close.
